tasks.title: Each task object in STATE.json has a `ticks` field that increments on every agent dispatch (including retries)
A replacement task created by replan starts with `ticks` equal to the replaced task's `ticks + 1`, not 0
`agt-harness transition` rejects `in-progress` for a task at or above `maxTaskTicks`, writing `reason: "tick-limit-exceeded"` and status `blocked` to STATE.json
`transition.mjs` detects a repeating pattern of length K ≥ 2 in the task's `transitionHistory` after the pattern repeats at least 2× and logs a warning to `progress.md`
Fix `run.mjs` to capture and act on harness transition result
tasks.description: At bin/lib/run.mjs line ~831, the call `harness('transition', '--task', task.id, '--status', 'in-progress')` discards its return value. Capture it: `const result = await harness(...)`. Then, before dispatching the agent, check `if (!result.allowed) { continue; }` (or equivalent skip logic) so that when oscillation halt fires and the wrapper returns `{ allowed: false, halt: true }`, the agent dispatch is skipped. Also verify that a halt: true result propagates correctly to terminate the feature run loop rather than continuing to other tasks.

tasks.title: `transition.mjs` detects a repeating pattern of length K ≥ 2 in the task's `transitionHistory` after the pattern repeats at least 2× and logs a warning to `progress.md`
On the 3rd repetition of the same oscillation pattern for a single task, the harness exits non-zero and sets feature `status: "oscillation-halted"` in STATE.json
`progress.md` contains a timestamped entry whenever a tick limit or oscillation halt fires, including the task ID and the triggering pattern or count
Fix gate command and ensure run.mjs writes PASS entries to progress.md
tasks.description: Two fixes required: (1) Replace the `echo gate-recorded` gate command with `npm test` so the artifact captures real test output. Audit the task's gate configuration and correct it. (2) In `run.mjs` near line 1020, locate the task-completion handshake path and ensure it appends a `✅ PASS` timestamped entry to `progress.md` (matching the same format used for FAIL entries). Verify by running `npm test` and confirming both the test output artifact and the progress.md PASS entry are produced correctly.

tasks.title: `progress.md` contains a timestamped entry whenever a tick limit or oscillation halt fires, including the task ID and the triggering pattern or count
Diagnose and permanently fix gate command reset to `echo gate-recorded`
tasks.description: Investigate why the gate command keeps being reset to `echo gate-recorded` across builder runs. Specifically: (1) inspect settings.json, settings.local.json, and any hook configurations for where the gate command is defined; (2) trace the commit history to understand what in commits 1060fc2 and d98fecd reverted the gate fixes from 47a6f31 and 0ffd491; (3) identify the authoritative source of the gate command (is it baked into the task spec, a hook, a config file, or generated by builder logic?); (4) apply a fix that survives subsequent builder commits; (5) run `npm test` and write the real output to `.team/features/oscillation-detection-tick-limits/tasks/task-7-r1/artifacts/test-output.txt`; (6) verify the artifact contains actual test results (not `gate-recorded`) before marking done.

tasks.title: `progress.md` contains a timestamped entry whenever a tick limit or oscillation halt fires, including the task ID and the triggering pattern or count
Unit tests pass for: tick increment, replan inheritance, tick-limit rejection, oscillation detection (length-2 cycle), feature halt condition
A manual smoke test with a mock task that always fails confirms the run terminates cleanly (not via `MAX_TOTAL_TRANSITIONS`) within `maxTaskTicks × 2` transitions
